title: The Devil's Passkey
writer: Baroness de Meyer, Erich von Stroheim
actors: Sam De Grasse, Una Trevelyn, Clyde Fillmore
plot: The wife of an American playwright in Paris becomes ensnared in the seductive wiles of an American Army officer, but her devotion to her husband convinces the officer to try to extricate her from the gossip and scandal that have e...
